summary: Iteration 158: Verified Arabic RTL POS cash register closing features. All 9 backend tests passed. UI testing confirmed: login works, dashboard loads, cash register dialog opens with all required elements (denominations grid always visible, refresh button, 'no cash available' button, confirm button, notes field). Backend APIs (GET /api/cash-register/summary, POST /api/cash-register/close) working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Dashboard.js line 2984-3031 - Denominations grid always visible (no conditional hide based on expected_cash)
VERIFIED: Dashboard.js line 2991-3000 - Refresh button with data-testid='refresh-summary-btn' present in dialog header
VERIFIED: Dashboard.js line 3076-3090 - 'No cash available' button (لا يوجد نقد متوفر) with data-testid='no-cash-btn' always visible
VERIFIED: Dashboard.js line 3093-3110 - Confirm close button with data-testid='confirm-close-btn' present
VERIFIED: Dashboard.js line 3003-3009 - Expected cash label shows 'نقدي - المصاريف' format
VERIFIED: Dashboard.js line 3064-3071 - Notes field with data-testid='close-notes' available
VERIFIED: shifts_routes.py line 283-509 - GET /api/cash-register/summary returns all required fields including total_refunds, refund_count
VERIFIED: shifts_routes.py line 511-724 - POST /api/cash-register/close handles denominations and returns complete closing data
VERIFIED: Dashboard.js line 885-933 - handleCloseRegister supports noCashMode parameter for direct close
VERIFIED: Dashboard.js line 1241-1371 - printClosingReceiptViaUSB function for USB auto-print (localhost:9999 MOCKED)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cash register closing dialog verified with all features: 1) Denominations grid always visible (7 inputs for Iraqi currency), 2) Refresh button in header, 3) 'No cash available' button for direct close, 4) Confirm close button, 5) Notes field. Backend APIs working: GET /api/cash-register/summary returns all fields, POST /api/cash-register/close handles denominations correctly. USB printing via localhost:9999 is MOCKED (Local Print Agent runs on user's machine).

verified_features.feature: Refresh button visible in dialog header

verified_features.method: UI - data-testid='no-cash-btn', text: 'لا يوجد نقد متوفر - إغلاق مباشر'
API - Handles denominations, returns closing data

mocked_apis_list: localhost:9999 - Local USB Print Agent (runs on user's local machine, not available in preview environment)

ui_verification.login_page: Working - Arabic RTL UI with background slideshow
ui_verification.dashboard: Working - Shows quick actions grid and statistics
ui_verification.cash_register_dialog: Working - All elements present: branch info, sales summary, denominations grid, notes, action buttons
